# Connector Matrix

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_connector_matrix.py. Do not hand-edit connector rows. -->

DataClaw ships with 21 catalog entries. This page is generated from `backend/app/services/connectors/catalog.py` and MCP tool coverage from `backend/app/services/mcp_catalog.py`.

See [Stability Tiers](./stability-tiers.md) for the policy behind each tier.

## Stability Tiers

| Tier | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 🟢 Stable | Read + write exercised live; audit/approval flow verified. Use in production. |
| 🔵 Stable (read-only) | Reads production-ready. Writes pending adapter work or intentionally not executed. |
| 🟡 Beta | Usable, but fixture-backed or live E2E coverage is incomplete. Not recommended for production write workflows. |
| 🔴 Known issue | Adapter has a documented bug that prevents normal use. Hidden by default unless explicitly enabled. |
| 🚫 Unsupported | Adapter retained for compatibility only; service or auth flow is not usable for new production installs. |

## Per-Connector Status

| `bigquery` | Data store | 🟢 Stable | Credential required | ✅ 12 | ✅ 7 | - | BigQuery emulator read/write E2E passed with approval gate, row-count verification, and cleanup. |

Fix: use psycopg2 driver or skip version probe. |

## Release Gate Evidence

Connector tier changes are code changes first. Promote a connector only when the release evidence backs the tier:

- `stable`: live read/write path exercised, approval gate observed for destructive writes, and `AgentWriteAudit` verified.
- `stable_read_only`: live read path exercised; write tools either absent, intentionally blocked, or documented as pending.
- `beta`: adapter is wired and tested with fixtures or partial live coverage, but production evidence is incomplete.
- `known_issue`: adapter routes exist, but a code-level or vendor-level issue blocks normal use.
- `unsupported`: retained for compatibility only.

The default CI gate must include this generated-doc parity check plus core stable connector tests. Full connector evidence is produced by `make test-integration-full` and the `integration-full` workflow.
